content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a pull request review for a new PR titled "feat: Review PSEPK pede GO annotations" that adds AI-assisted review files for the P. putida KT2440 gene "pede". The PR contains 4 new files with GO annotation reviews and research data.

b. **Request type**: This is explicitly a code review request. The direct prompt asks me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**:
   - PR adds 4 files for PSEPK/pede gene review
   - Files include: ai-review.yaml (447 lines), deep-research-falcon.md (368 lines), goa.tsv (10 lines), uniprot.txt (355 lines)
   - Part of the P_PUTIDA project
   - Branch: feat/review-psepk-pede -> main
   - Author: cmungall

d. **Main tasks**: 
   - Read and analyze the 4 added files
   - Review the YAML structure against the schema requirements
   - Check for best practices in gene annotation review
   - Validate data quality and consistency
   - Provide constructive feedback on the review content

e. **Plan of action**:
   - Read CLAUDE.md to understand project guidelines
   - Examine each of the 4 added files
   - Validate the ai-review.yaml against schema requirements
   - Check for proper citation format and evidence quality
   - Review annotation decisions for consistency with GO guidelines
   - Provide comprehensive feedback via GitHub comment

f. **Limitations**: I can provide thorough review feedback but cannot run validation commands due to environment limitations. Will note this for the user.
</analysis>

Let me start by creating a todo list and reading the repository guidelines, then examining the PR files for review.

input.body: ### PR Review: PSEPK pede GO annotations Reviewing this AI-assisted gene annotation review for *P. putida* KT2440 gene **pede**. #### Todo List: - [ ] Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Examine pede-ai-review.yaml structure and content - [ ] Review pede-deep-research-falcon.md for research quality - [ ] Check pede-goa.tsv and pede-uniprot.txt data files - [ ] Validate annotation decisions against GO guidelines - [ ] Assess citation quality and evidence support - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback and recommendations #### Progress: Starting review analysis... --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23372183867)
